author: Samuel Vaillant
subject: fix(maps): revert Provider should update (algolia/react-instantsearch#1401)
body:
* fix(maps): avoid to rely on bbox change in Provider too unstable

* refactor(maps): reset hasMapMoveSinceLastRefine with gDSFP rather than CDU

* chore(stories): disable the gestures on the map when refine is disabled

* chore(maps): add react-lifecycle-compat package

* feat(maps): polyfill lifecylce for Connector

* fix(maps): increase bundle size to 10.5KB
